halfLife.conditions: Elimination half-life of the d-enantiomer ~10 h at normal urine pH (l-amphetamine ~11-14 h; the racemate mean plasma half-life ~12 h per the FDA Dexedrine label). Like methamphetamine the half-life is urine-pH dependent (weak base, partly renally excreted unchanged). Point value 10 h for d-amphetamine at normal urine pH.

vd.conditions: Volume of distribution ~4 L/kg (StatPearls); amphetamine is lipophilic with low (<20%) plasma protein binding, so widely distributed. Point value 4.4 L/kg is the Cmax-consistent choice within the ~3-5 L/kg range (the diphenhydramine posture): it lands the built 15 mg oral peak on the FDA-label ~36.6 ng/mL. Scaled to absolute litres against the 70 kg reference subject at derivation time (~308 L).

F.conditions: Oral bioavailability ~90% (amphetamine is well absorbed from the gut; F varies mildly with GI pH). Treated as a true F with a Cmax-consistent true volume.

tmax.conditions: FDA Dexedrine label: after three 5 mg immediate-release tablets, mean maximal dextroamphetamine plasma concentration ~36.6 ng/mL at ~3 h. Point value 3 h; ka derived from this Tmax at derivation time. (Spansule sustained-release Tmax ~8 h - not modelled; the IR case is used.)

F.conditions: Offered as an INFERRED route (available: false) - Dexedrine is oral only, but IV is a real route of abuse and the disposition is a true volume + half-life, so the fast-onset IV contrast can be shown honestly (the methamphetamine/acamprosate inferred-IV posture). Labelled 'inferred, not based on route-specific data' by the UI.

variability.notes: Half-life depends on urine pH (renal excretion of unchanged drug is pH-sensitive). CYP2D6 (polymorphic) contributes to metabolism (4-hydroxylation). These modulate exposure but are not used to produce a dose.

dexedrine_label.title: DEXEDRINE (dextroamphetamine sulfate) - FDA Structured Product Label, clinical pharmacology (average plasma half-life ~12 h; after three 5 mg tablets mean maximal plasma concentration ~36.6 ng/mL at ~3 h; sustained-release Spansule Cmax ~23.5 ng/mL at ~8 h; extent of bioavailability of SR similar to IR)

statpearls.title: Dextroamphetamine-Amphetamine, StatPearls (NCBI Bookshelf NBK507808): volume of distribution ~4 L/kg, plasma protein binding <20%, oral bioavailability ~90%, d-enantiomer half-life ~10 h / l-enantiomer ~13 h at normal urine pH, hepatic (CYP2D6) and renal elimination

notes:
Dextroamphetamine (d-amphetamine) - the prototypical amphetamine stimulant; a marketed medicine (Dexedrine, for ADHD/narcolepsy) that is also a classic illicit/recreational stimulant ('speed') and a Schedule II controlled substance. Modelled as a clean LINEAR one-compartment oral drug; amphetamine kinetics are first-order and dose-proportional at therapeutic/recreational doses, so superposition holds (linear: true).

WHY DEXTROAMPHETAMINE - the clean-label stimulant sibling to methamphetamine. It provides a well-characterised FDA-label stimulant (a firm Cmax anchor: 15 mg -> 36.6 ng/mL at 3 h) next to methamphetamine's more heterogeneous forensic literature. The pair also teaches structure-kinetics: methamphetamine is d-amphetamine plus an N-methyl group, is more lipophilic/CNS-penetrant, and is partly N-demethylated back to amphetamine in vivo (so amphetamine is BOTH a drug in its own right and a methamphetamine metabolite - see the methamphetamine file).

WHY NOT A DRAWN METABOLITE PAIR. Amphetamine's onward metabolites (4-hydroxyamphetamine, norephedrine) have no single citable fraction-formed, and the methamphetamine->amphetamine link that would make an interesting pair is CYP2D6-genotype-bimodal (no single fm), so no metabolite line is drawn - amphetamine ships as its own single compound. Lisdexamfetamine (Vyvanse) is a separate d-amphetamine PRODRUG (enzymatically hydrolysed to d-amphetamine) - not modelled here.

SOFT INPUTS. The volume (~4.4 L/kg) is Cmax-consistent within the cited ~3-5 L/kg range (chosen with F = 0.9 to land the 15 mg peak on the label's 36.6 ng/mL - the diphenhydramine posture). The half-life is the d-enantiomer's ~10 h at normal urine pH and, as with methamphetamine, is urine-pH dependent (a documented conditional value, not a dose-nonlinearity). Clearance is deliberately NOT stored (Vd + half-life fix ke - the cetirizine rule).

ROUTES. Oral (Dexedrine, the real marketed route) available; IV bolus offered as INFERRED (available: false - oral-only product, but IV is a real abuse route and the disposition is a true volume + half-life). The immediate-release case is modelled (the SR Spansule's later/lower peak is noted, not modelled).

MAGNITUDE CHECK. Built 15 mg oral curve peaks ~35.6 ng/mL near 3 h, matching the FDA-label value (36.6 ng/mL, ~3% under). EDUCATIONAL ILLUSTRATION ONLY - not for dosing.
